testimonials.label: Customer Testimonials
testimonials.item1Quote: I really appreciate how straightforward the laundry service is and how quickly their customer support responds. I can't see myself managing without it.
testimonials.item2Quote: Smart Wash has completely changed how I manage my laundry. Excellent service and pristine dry cleaning every single time.
testimonials.item3Quote: The 24-hour turnaround is a lifesaver. I scheduled a pickup at night and received my crisp, clean suits the next evening.
testimonials.item4Quote: Outstanding support and incredibly convenient app. The tracking feature is super precise and the laundry smells absolutely amazing.

faqSection.label: FAQ
faqSection.title: Got Questions?
faqSection.a1: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur. Egestas enim sed senectus ornare pellentesque duis. Gravida purus netus lobortis ultricies sit sollicitudin. At nulla urna nisl quisque scelerisque dignissim eget nunc adipiscing. At nulla urna nisl quisque scelerisque dignissim eget nunc adipiscing.
faqSection.q2: What are your laundry processing times?
faqSection.a2: Our standard turnaround time is 24 to 48 hours. We also offer same-day express service for orders received before 10 AM.
faqSection.q3: How can I pay for my orders?
faqSection.a3: We accept online credit/debit card payments through our app, cash on delivery, or card payment on delivery via our driver's mobile POS terminal.
faqSection.q4: Is there a minimum order amount?
faqSection.a4: Yes, our minimum order value is 30 AED. Any orders below this amount will be charged the base minimum of 30 AED.
faqSection.q5: How do you handle delicate garments?
faqSection.a5: We inspect each garment according to its care labels. Delicate fabrics are treated with specialized gentle solvents and dry-cleaned separately.
faqSection.q6: What if my clothes get damaged?
faqSection.a6: Every order is fully insured up to 500 AED. In the rare event of damage, we assume full responsibility to replace or compensate according to our policy.

footer.desc: Premium laundry & dry cleaning at your doorstep. Clean clothes, zero hassle.

pricingPage.sectionDesc:
Pre-paid bags with a fixed capacity — perfect for your weekly laundry.
Each bag holds up to 15 items.

pricingPage.card2Desc: Everyday laundry washed, dried, and neatly folded, ready for your wardrobe.
pricingPage.card3Desc: Premium care for delicate fabrics using specialized eco-friendly cleaning.
pricingPage.card4Desc: Deep cleaning for bedding, curtains, and linens to keep your home fresh.
pricingPage.card5Desc: Expert cleaning and polishing to restore your footwear to like-new condition.
pricingPage.card6Desc: Advanced deep-shampoo treatment to remove stains and refresh your rugs.
